'''âk-v-p''' ('''kakavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:narcotise|narcotise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:narcotise|narcotise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikavap|thikavap]] || [[word:jikavap|jikavap]] || [[word:shikavap|shikavap]] || [[word:kikavap|kikavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukavap|thuthukavap]] || [[word:jujukavap|jujukavap]] || [[word:shushukavap|shushukavap]] || [[word:kukukavap|kukukavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukavap|thukavap]] || [[word:jukavap|jukavap]] || [[word:shukavap|shukavap]] || [[word:kukavap|kukavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukavap|thukavap]] || [[word:jukavap|jukavap]] || [[word:shukavap|shukavap]] || [[word:kukavap|kukavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekavap|thekavap]] || [[word:jekavap|jekavap]] || [[word:shekavap|shekavap]] || [[word:kekavap|kekavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokavap|thothokavap]] || [[word:jojokavap|jojokavap]] || [[word:shoshokavap|shoshokavap]] || [[word:kokokavap|kokokavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokavap|thokavap]] || [[word:jokavap|jokavap]] || [[word:shokavap|shokavap]] || [[word:kokavap|kokavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokavap|thokavap]] || [[word:jokavap|jokavap]] || [[word:shokavap|shokavap]] || [[word:kokavap|kokavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkavap|thĂŠkavap]] || [[word:jĂŠkavap|jĂŠkavap]] || [[word:shĂŠkavap|shĂŠkavap]] || [[word:kĂŠkavap|kĂŠkavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakavap|thathakavap]] || [[word:jajakavap|jajakavap]] || [[word:shashakavap|shashakavap]] || [[word:kakakavap|kakakavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakavap|thakavap]] || [[word:jakavap|jakavap]] || [[word:shakavap|shakavap]] || [[word:kakavap|kakavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakavap|thakavap]] || [[word:jakavap|jakavap]] || [[word:shakavap|shakavap]] || [[word:kakavap|kakavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakavap|shakavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakavap|goshakavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakavap|gokishakavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakavapnĂŒ|shakavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakavapnknĂŒ|goshakavapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavapnĂŒ|gokishakavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakavapshĂ«|shakavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakavapnkshĂ«|goshakavapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakavapshĂ«|gokishakavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavapro|shakavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavapnkro|goshakavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavapro|gokishakavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavapmu|shakavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavapnkmu|goshakavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavapmu|gokishakavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakavapsher|shakavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakavapnksher|goshakavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakavapsher|gokishakavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakavapng|shakavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakavapnkng|goshakavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakavapng|gokishakavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakavapya|shakavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakavapnkya|goshakavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakavapya|gokishakavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakavapyam|shakavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakavapnkyam|goshakavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakavapyam|gokishakavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavapnĂŒshĂ«|shakavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakavapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavapnĂŒro|shakavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavapnknĂŒro|goshakavapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavapnĂŒro|gokishakavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavapnĂŒmu|shakavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavapnknĂŒmu|goshakavapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavapnĂŒmu|gokishakavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavapshĂ«nĂŒ|shakavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavapshĂ«ro|shakavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavapnkshĂ«ro|goshakavapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavapshĂ«ro|gokishakavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavapshĂ«mu|shakavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavapnkshĂ«mu|goshakavapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavapshĂ«mu|gokishakavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavapronĂŒ|shakavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavapnkronĂŒ|goshakavapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavapronĂŒ|gokishakavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavaproshĂ«|shakavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavapnkroshĂ«|goshakavapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavaproshĂ«|gokishakavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakavapromu|shakavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakavapnkromu|goshakavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakavapromu|gokishakavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakavapmunĂŒ|shakavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakavapnkmunĂŒ|goshakavapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakavapmunĂŒ|gokishakavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakavapmushĂ«|shakavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakavapnkmushĂ«|goshakavapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakavapmushĂ«|gokishakavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakavapmuro|shakavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakavapnkmuro|goshakavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakavapmuro|gokishakavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
